decisions.title_en: Google finally ships Gemini 3.5 Pro after full rebuild
decisions.reason: Previously published 2026-07-12 as the DELAY story ('推翻重练:Google把Gemini 3.5 Pro推迟到7月17日'). New info: the model actually launched today (2026-07-17) with confirmed 2M context window, Deep Think on the $250 Ultra tier, and API pricing (~$1.25 in / $10 out). Title/summary must cover the launch, not the delay.

decisions.title_en: Xi Jinping attends WAIC in person for first time; China pushes WAICO governance body
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. WAIC opens 2026-07-17 in Shanghai; Xi delivers his first-ever in-person WAIC keynote and China pushes a Shanghai-headquartered World AI Cooperation Organization (WAICO).

decisions.title_en: Hassabis, Amodei, Altman all publish frontier-AI regulation proposals
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. Hassabis published FINRA-for-AI proposal 07-14; by 07-16 Amodei (FAA), Altman (IAEA) and industry praise converged, Zuckerberg reportedly drafting his own memo.

decisions.title_en: Huawei debuts Atlas 950 SuperPoD at WAIC, 8192-card interconnect
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. Huawei unveils Atlas 950 SuperPoD at WAIC 2026: 1024 accelerators/node, 1 EFLOPS FP8, scaling to 8192 NPUs; distinct hardware angle from the WAIC governance story.

decisions.title_en: Indian AI coding startup Emergent becomes unicorn with $130M Series C
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. $130M Series C at $1.5B post-money, led by Creaegis, ~1 year after launch.

decisions.title_en: Neko Health raises $700M Series C for AI preventive body scanning
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. $700M Series C led by Lightspeed for Daniel Ek's AI preventive-health scanning company.

decisions.title_en: OpenAI researcher Miles Wang in talks to launch $2B AI drug discovery startup
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. Miles Wang raising ~$200M at $2B valuation, Lightspeed in talks to lead.

decisions.title_en: Anthropic finds a 'global workspace' J-space inside Claude
decisions.reason: event_date 2026-07-06 is 11 days old (>5-day limit). No new development within window.

decisions.title_en: OpenAI proposes giving US government a 5% stake
decisions.reason: event_date 2026-07-02 is 15 days old (>5-day limit); July-17 mentions merely recap the July-2 proposal, no fresh development found.

decisions.title_en: OpenAI closes record $122B round at $852B valuation
decisions.reason: Round closed in March 2026; far outside 5-day window.

decisions.title_en: China AI agent / anthropomorphic rules take effect July 15
decisions.reason: Already published 2026-07-12 ('中国拟人化AI新规7月15日生效'), which explicitly named the July-15 effective date. Effectiveness milestone adds no substantively new facts.

decisions.title_en: FTC seeks comment on policy statement addressing AI accuracy
decisions.reason: Weak/uncertain event date and regulatory angle already covered editorially by ai-labs-regulation-convergence; dropped to avoid a thin duplicate regulatory card.
